name: Conversation List
description: Sidebar conversation history with search, new chat button, and conversation items showing unread indicators and actions.

standard.description: Full conversation list with search and details

compact.description: Icon-only list for collapsed sidebar rail

slots.items: Conversation rows with icon, title, date, unread-indicator, actions

visual_brief: Vertical sidebar panel with a search input at the top (magnifying glass icon, 'Search conversations' placeholder), a 'New Chat' button below it, and a scrollable list of conversation items. Each item shows a chat icon or model avatar, the conversation title (truncating with ellipsis), a last-message date in small muted text, and an unread count badge (colored circle with number) when applicable. The active conversation has a highlighted surface background. Hovering reveals a three-dot menu for rename and delete actions. Compact preset reduces row height and hides dates.

responsive.mobile: Conversation list takes full screen as a page. Selecting an item navigates to the chat view. New Chat button is a floating action button.
responsive.tablet: Sidebar panel at 280px width. Standard row heights.
responsive.desktop: Sidebar panel at 300px width with comfortable spacing. Full dates visible. Hover actions on each row.

layout_hints.list_priority: The active conversation and unread state should be immediately legible. Search and new-chat actions support the list but should not compete with it visually.
layout_hints.row_density: Keep row metadata concise so titles remain dominant and the sidebar does not become noisy. Compact mode should still preserve active-state clarity.
layout_hints.mobile_translation: On small screens, treat the list as its own route-level selection surface rather than a cramped embedded sidebar.

motion.micro: Active rows may sharpen or lift slightly, and unread indicators may pulse gently only when newly changed.
motion.transitions: Search filtering and conversation switching should feel immediate and stable, with no heavy motion that disrupts scan flow.

keyboard: Conversation rows and their overflow actions should follow a predictable top-to-bottom order.
announcements: Unread state, active conversation, title, and recency should be exposed semantically so the list remains understandable without hover or color cues.

composition.ConversationList: Panel(d-surface, flex-col, full-height) > [SearchInput(d-control, icon: search) + NewChatButton(d-interactive, variant: primary) + ItemList]
composition.ConversationItem: Row(d-data-row, hoverable, active?: highlighted) > [ChatIcon + Title(ellipsis) + Date(text-muted, text-xs) + UnreadBadge?(d-annotation, accent)]
